Event: Magic Well - March 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A21


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Helm of Unity Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Hidden Lock Technique
The unit starts throwing shurikens at the enemies for 4 sec. Each second, the unit throws 3 shurikens at random enemies. Shurikens can hit a single enemy. Each shuriken deals 175000 physical damage, reduces armor by 20% for 3 sec, and inflicts exhaustion. Each second, the target takes physical damage equal to 80% of the unit's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 25%. The exhaustion lasts for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
